title: Studio Kharas big feature in June 2011 Newtype
display_title: Studio Kharas big feature in June 2011 Newtype
wikitext:
[]: Studio Khara's big feature in June 2011 Newtype.... Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 08, 2011 1:18 pm Sauce: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1198.html The question is, will this be something Q related or something about Anno's movie project? Supposedly it'll contain some kind of Interviews with Anno and other Studio Khara staff.... Hopefully it'll be related to Q somehow (then again, why else would it be in Newtype if it wouldn't be....) EDIT: The issue will be on newsstands May 10th, for people skimming this thread.

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Apr 08, 2011 3:06 pm Definetly Eva related, most likely a film announcement Newtype is anime magazine HEEEEELLLLLL YEAAAAAHHHHHHHHH if they do announce Q then my prediction that Evangelion 3.0 news come in summer, gets release date set somewhere in December or late October and gets pushed back to January/February thanks to lolAnno seems beliavable...

[]: Post by Kevin » Fri Apr 08, 2011 3:09 pm Finally!

[]: Post by Mugi » Fri Apr 08, 2011 3:15 pm Nice! Though I'm gonna be away from home for a couple of months (no computer for about 2 months). I'll probably write a letter to one of my friends who likes Eva to at least tell me about it.

[]: Re: Studio Khara's big feature in June 2011 Newtype.... Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Apr 08, 2011 3:35 pm I kind of doubt Anno would take out a feature in Newtype to talk about his new live-action art film. It's definitely gonna be 3.0 -related. And that means it will be just about time for me to leave this forum for the next few years...

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Apr 08, 2011 4:00 pm I can't read a word printed on that site, but I guess it should excite me....

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Apr 08, 2011 7:13 pm & Pants come off.... NOW

[]: Post by Azathoth » Fri Apr 08, 2011 7:37 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I can't read a word printed on that site, but I guess it should excite me....

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 08, 2011 10:10 pm The Official Evangelion website has a blog post up about the Newtype announcement: http://eva2.0.b-ch.com/blog/2_0/archives/315 I'd say this means we're good to go on FINALLY getting some Q news. BRB, change of pants needed.

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Fri Apr 08, 2011 11:03 pm If they announce the names of Tunny and Clocky and they happen to be Kushiel and Othniel no one here can ever say I'm not a giant monster expert/the #1 expert of monsters of the week. So how long until Newtype's next issue is released? And why do half you people need a change in pants?

[]: Post by Kodaemon » Fri Apr 08, 2011 11:22 pm As for the June/May thing, it's probably that the June issue actually comes out in May. Magazine publishing schedules tend to get weird like this.

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Apr 08, 2011 11:30 pm Excitement! Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: So how long until Newtype's next issue is released?

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Sat Apr 09, 2011 12:39 am "We used our time machine to go back and release 3.33 on DVD a month ago! Go buy it now y'all!" The announcement I'm hoping for.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Apr 09, 2011 7:16 am Azathoth wrote: It seems that there will be an interview with Anno in the July(? they also seem to mention May) issue of Newtype, which will also include a feature on Khara. It's not made clear to what extent this is connected to Q, but come on, what else could it be? nobody answer that

[]: Post by Seen » Sat Apr 09, 2011 7:31 am OH MY GOD I HAVE SUCH A HUGE BONER

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 09, 2011 8:57 am It can't be! I must be dreaming... have my prayers finally been heard?!

[]: Post by svenge » Sat Apr 09, 2011 9:04 am Seen wrote: OH MY GOD I HAVE SUCH A HUGE BONER

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Apr 09, 2011 10:08 am Xard wrote: gets release date set somewhere in December or late October and gets pushed back to January/February thanks to lolAnno seems beliavable...

[]: Post by Fireball » Sat Apr 09, 2011 11:28 am Really looking forward to this. Been long since we heared from the man himself.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 09, 2011 1:15 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Lolno. There will always be an extended period of magazine pimping before release. That's how Japan did it for 30 years and that's what sustains the anime magazines. There's no reason for anyone to change that. In slightly related news, since THIS THREAD is locked I might as well post here: The Khara recruitment page has been updated on April 6th to say that currently they're not recruiting.
